productDisplayName: Paris Hilton Just Me Women Perfume
description: paris hilton's Just Me perfume is a youth-oriented, long-lasting fragrance in a cylindrical two-tone bottle. The dominant tones are raspberries, lily of the valley, iris, white rose, vanilla and sandalwood.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
